title: Sub sub-items
excerpt: is there a way to add sub items to sub items?

posts.author: MeghanVincent (Meghan Vincent)
posts.cookedHtml: is there a way to add sub items to sub items?

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
I believe there are some third party apps that can accomplish this, but natively within Monday there is not technically a layer below subitems.

What our team does is uses checklists in the updates of subitems to act as a layer below sub-items. If you want to learn more about checklists here is an article from Monday https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005342005-The-Checklist - this option is great if you are looking for something that does not cost extra and is natively within Monday, the third party apps will likely have a cost associated with them, but might offer some additional functionality.

posts.author: jamesmuscat (James)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever get an answer to this @MeghanVincent - it would be great to know whether embedding sub-items within sub-items is still on the product road map or not.

posts.author: jamesmuscat (James)
posts.cookedHtml: Is the feature of embedding sub-items within a sub-item in the Roadmap?

posts.author: MeghanVincent (Meghan Vincent)
posts.cookedHtml: There is an app called Unlimited Subitems that we have enabled. It is $21 a month for 15 users

posts.author: jjDemir (Joshua Tasdemir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Where is this at? Come on Monday we are waiting patiently, your competitors offer this feature.
I would go as far to say that infinite sub sub items.
